{'reasoning': 'The unit cube is subdivided into a grid of 32x32x64 cells. The 8 corner cells each have 3 face-adjacent neighbors inside the cube. These 24 distinct leaf nodes are the ones that share a face with one of the corner leaf nodes. Their paths are calculated by flipping the last split bit in each dimension from the corresponding corner path.', 'nodes': ['0000000000000001', '0000000000000010', '0000000000000100', '0010010010010000', '0010010010010011', '0010010010010110', '0100100100100000', '0100100100100101', '0100100100100110', '0110110110110010', '0110110110110100', '0110110110110111', '1001001001001000', '1001001001001011', '1001001001001101', '1011011011011001', '1011011011011010', '1011011011011111', '1101101101101001', '1101101101101100', '1101101101101111', '1111111111111011', '1111111111111101', '1111111111111110']}
